title: Independently verify final JSON report
scope: Audit the final JSON for factual accuracy, source support, internal consistency, completeness against the user request, and JSON validity. Perform narrow web checks for high-risk or surprising claims.
goals: Validate that the final report answers the requested question for both VS Code and Obsidian.
Check that subscription/API claims are supported by current official sources.
Check that each recommended project actually supports the claimed editor and autocomplete mode.
Write a verification handoff with pass/fail, corrections, and residual uncertainty.
non_goals: Do not rewrite the whole report unless necessary.
Do not skip independent source checks for subscription claims.
safety: Do not read tmp/, archive/, or prompt-buffer.md.
Do not edit files tagged human-written.
If editing the final report, keep changes minimal and document them.
success_criteria: If corrections are needed, either patch the final report or provide exact required changes.
Final report remains parseable by jq.
